examples.title: Producer-Consumer Solution
examples.code:
semaphore mutex = 1
semaphore empty = N
semaphore full = 0

Producer:
  while True:
    item = produce()
    wait(empty)
    wait(mutex)
    add_to_buffer(item)
    signal(mutex)
    signal(full)
examples.explanation: Uses empty/full semaphores to control buffer slots
